pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy Zach's Saudi Arabia pick is puttin' him on a rollercoaster to rock bottom.** Now he's bankin' on Brazil to save him against Morocco. Zach thought oil money meant goals, but he's been watchin' too many telenovelas. Brazil’s recent form has been solid, but let’s be real, watching Zach’s fantasy team is like watchin’ a squirrel try to solve a Rubik’s cube. Meanwhile, Bubba G Gunner’s puttin’ his faith in Morocco like he’s got some secret camel training regimen we don’t know about. But hey, with Gunner’s knack for draftin' DR Congo, I wouldn’t be surprised if Morocco shows up with sombreros. I'm backin' Brazil to dribble their way to a clean 3-0 stompin'. Mustard Boy's gonna need more than ketchup to catch up.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach confident as Switzerland set to face undrafted Qatar
pundit_takes.subtitle: Hopes this is finally the match that earns him points.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy banking on Brazil to boost zero-point campaign
pundit_takes.subtitle: Even a loss could arguably be an improvement.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper leads standings with points from USA victory
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's strategy: Draft home team, watch it thrive.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin set to gamble on Turkey against Australia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's cunning tactic of drafting obscure teams put to test.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach living rent-free at the basement, win rate at a staggering zero percent.
Rafe's Tier-1 pick Germany is his only lifeline in a sea of chaos.
Rafe gave Devin a -3 reality check, courtesy of little experience, big results.
Sim had Gunner as favorite; Rafe's teenage chaos magic called its bluff.
